events.title: Clothing Swap
events.description: 👚♻️ Clothing Swaps at Crooked Lane ♻️👖Refresh your wardrobe this summer while giving back to the community!Join us at Crooked Lane Brewing Company for our monthly Clothing Swap — a fun, sustainable way to clear out your closet and discover some new-to-you favorites.✨ How It Works: • Bring 5 or more new or gently used clothing items • Browse and swap for free! • Forgot to bring items but still want to shop? No worries — just a $2 donation to participateAll unclaimed clothing and monetary donations will be donated to Stand Up Placer, helping support local community members in need.So not only are you upgrading your wardrobe, you’re also making a positive impact right here in our community. 💛Grab your friends, bring your style, and come swap with us this summer!#ClothingSwap #SustainableStyle #ShopSwapRepeat #CrookedLaneBrewing #CommunityStrong #SupportLocal (Recurring: Does not Repeat)

events.title: Sake Dinner Featuring Heiwa Shuzo
events.description: Join us for a guided evening featuring 6 courses paired with 6 premium sakes from Heiwa Shuzo, an acclaimed brewery from Wakayama, Japan. Founded over 100 years ago, Heiwa Shuzo blends traditional brewing methods with a modern approach that has earned international recognition for its KID sake lineup. Throughout the dinner, sake sommelier Tayler Pecha will lead guests through each pairing, covering tasting notes, brewing techniques, rice polishing, and the story behind the brewery. Whether you're new to sake or already a fan, this is a great opportunity to explore a variety of styles in a relaxed and educational setting. Experience Includes: 6-course chef-curated dinner 6 Heiwa Shuzo sake pairings Guided tasting and education with Tayler Pecha #block-c5e9c41c048e0f7063a5 { } #block-c5e9c41c048e0f7063a5 .sqs-html-content { } #block-c5e9c41c048e0f7063a5 { mix-blend-mode: var(--tweak-text-block-blend ); border-radius: var(--tweak-text-block-radius); } @media screen and (max-width: 767px) { #block-c5e9c41c048e0f7063a5 { } } @media screen and (max-width: 767px) { #block-c5e9c41c048e0f7063a5 .sqs-html-content { } } @media screen and (max-width: 767px) { }

events.title: Magic The Gathering
events.description: Every WednesdayMagic: The Gathering Nights Are Here! Join us this summer for special Wizards of the Coast Magic: The Gathering gameplay! We’ll be running casual Commander—perfect for seasoned players and newcomers alike.~All ages welcome ~Great for beginners—learn to play in a fun, relaxed settingFree booster packs available when you: • Sign up to play • Purchase 2 beverages • Become the top player of the nightGrab your deck (or just show up) and join the fun! (Recurring: Every)

events.title: Supreme Pro Wrestling July 18th
events.description: 💥 Supreme Pro Wrestling Returns to Crooked Lane! 💥Get ready for another season of high-flying action, big personalities, and unforgettable nights at the brewery. Supreme Pro Wrestling is back and bringing the energy with four epic shows this year:📅 April 11 📅 May 9 📅 July 18 📅 September 26Single-show tickets are $13 online presale or $15 at the door. This is an all-ages event, so bring the whole crew and enjoy a night of wrestling, great beer, and big-time entertainment.Get your tickets and get ready to rumble at the brewery! **2 CHILDREN UNDER 10 ADMITTED FREE WITH EACH ADULT TICKET PURCHASED** (Recurring: Does not Repeat)

events.title: Live Music with Midnight Sun
events.description: We are excited to welcome Midnight Sun to the Crooked Lane stage! Midnight Sun brings a great vibe, high energy performance with a very versatile set list and songs you don't hear everyday at a brewery, winery or bar. Their set list blends rock, pop and indie staples with a fresh dynamic feel - perfect for creating a lively atmosphere that keeps guests engaged and staying around for another round. (Recurring: Does not Repeat)
